$description: BIM PROFESSIONAL OFFICE SUBTYPES token category — taxonomy and classification of the five Professional Office sub-types (Medical, Business, Laboratory, Academic, Civic) and their variants. Sub-types are the leasable-office categories within a Professional Centre or Suburban Office floor plate. Each occupies a 1/4 floor tile (5,000 SF / 464.52 m²) or combination thereof. Source: CONSTRUCTION_2026_01_06_Key Plan_Professional Office_FFE_FIN.xlsx (V3, 2025-11-29); AEC_Floor Plates_Key Plans_Index.pdf (V2, 2025-01-07, Collaborators #27); AEC_Floor Plates_Key Plans_Samples_V2.pdf (Collaborators #32, 2025-03-03); DISCOVERY_MCorp_Sketches_Key Plans_Summary_Notes.pdf. Key plan area measurements are in building-width-calculator.dtcg.json; this file captures taxonomy, codes, and specialisation variants.

$value.label: Medical Office
$value.design_notes: Wider Zone 1 (7.2m) than other sub-types to accommodate exam-table depth and patient + clinician circulation. ADA/CSA-B651 corridor width. Acoustic and vibration isolation requirements. Demising wall required between suites.

medical.$description: Medical Office — clinical, dental, diagnostic, and allied health leaseholds. FFE codes M1 (1,100 SF), M2 (1,400 SF), M3 (800 SF). Specialisations: Dentist, General Practitioner.

$value.label: Business Office
$value.design_notes: Widest Zone 2 Magazine (7.3m) across all sub-types — reflects open storage walls, server rooms, print areas, and team collaboration zones. Large corporate office adjacencies common.

business.$description: Business Office — general commercial office, co-working-adjacent, larger open-plan leaseholds. FFE codes B1 (1,100 SF), B2 (1,400 SF), B3 (800 SF).

$value.label: Laboratory
$value.design_notes: Wider Zone 1 (6.78m / 22'3") than standard Professional Office to accommodate bench depth and fume hood clearances per German Circulation Law. IBC high-hazard occupancy egress width (3.048m / 10'0") in Zone 3 corridor. Small key plan: 195 m² (2,099 SF); Medium: 316 m² (3,401 SF); Large: 400.7 m² (4,313 SF).

laboratory.$description: Laboratory — scientific, research, and testing leaseholds. Specialisations: Medical Laboratory, Research Laboratory. FFE codes L1–L3. Key plan sizes: Small 2,099 SF, Medium 3,401 SF, Large 4,313 SF.

$value.label: Academic Office
$value.design_notes: Shorter Zone 1 (4.7m / 15'5") than other sub-types because seating faces forward rather than toward façade. No bilateral corridor — suites open to building corridor. Small: 87.7 m² (944 SF) includes podium, desks, auditorium seating, storage; Medium: 240.3 m² (2,586 SF); Large: 376.3 m² (4,050 SF). Source: AEC_Floor Plates_Key Plans_Samples_V2.pdf.

academic.$description: Academic Office — classrooms, seminar rooms, lecture halls. Specialisations: Classroom, Seminar Room, Lecture Hall. FFE codes A1–A3. Key plan sizes: Small 944 SF, Medium 2,586 SF, Large 4,050 SF.

$value.label: Civic Office
$value.design_notes: Widest overall floor plate — large Zone 2 Magazine (7.23m / 23'8") for public records and secure areas; widest Zone 3 Corridor (3.6m / 12'0") across all sub-types for public assembly egress. ADA/accessible-route compliance mandatory throughout leasehold.

civic.$description: Civic Office — courtrooms, municipal offices, cultural, and civic assembly spaces. FFE codes C1–C3. Widest corridor (3.6m / 12'0") across all Professional Office sub-types.
